result.stdout:
USAGE: fsy [--help] [--verbose] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    install-fsx-extensions, ifsx
                          Copies the dlls required for editor support to a
                          stable location: ~/.fsharp/fsx-extensions/.fsch
    run <options>         Runs the script in-process
    compile <options>     Compiles the script

    Use 'fsy <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --verbose, -v         Shows some log messages
    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: fsy [--help] [--verbose] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    install-fsx-extensions, ifsx
                          Copies the dlls required for editor support to a
                          stable location: ~/.fsharp/fsx-extensions/.fsch
    run <options>         Runs the script in-process
    compile <options>     Compiles the script

    Use 'fsy <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --verbose, -v         Shows some log messages
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: fsy compile [--help] [--cache-dir <string>] [--output-dir <string>]
                   [--force] [--symbol <string>] [--contentaddressablecache]
                   [<script.fsx>]

SCRIPT:

    <script.fsx>          Path of the F# script to run/compile

OPTIONS:

    --cache-dir, -c <string>
                          Sets the cache directory. Default: ./.fsy
    --output-dir, -o <string>
                          Output dir. Default: a new dir created in cwd (named
                          after the input script file name)
    --force, -f           Clears the cache and forces re-compilation
    --symbol, -s <string> Allows defining symbols that can be used e.g. in #if
                          directives. Use multiple times to define many symbols
    --contentaddressablecache, -a
                          Use content-addressable cache
    --verbose, -v         Shows some log messages
    --help                display this list of options.
